---
title: "Funding partners"
---

The A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice program is supported by the
individuals and organizations listed below. Each entry appears here
only with the partner's explicit consent and in the form they have
approved.

## Current funding partners

<!-- Add entries below as partners agree to public attribution. -->

*No public funding partners listed yet.*

## Acknowledgements

The series is, at the time of writing, self-funded. Domain
registration, compute, and storage costs are borne directly by the
principal investigator. Partner contributions will be acknowledged
here as the program grows.

## How to support the program

If you are interested in supporting this research, see the [contact
page](contact.qmd) for the appropriate point of contact.
